name: Mall Tycoon
author: Poki
description: Mall Tycoon is a simulation game where you build and run your very own shopping mall! Pick the perfect stores, stock up on products, decorate with stylish furniture, and hire the best employees. The more variety you offer, the more cash rolls in! But watch out—sneaky thieves are always lurking. Can you grow your mall into a shopping empire while keeping crime in check? How to play Mall Tycoon? Click or tap to make the choice. Use WASD, the arrow keys, or the joystick to move. Who created Mall Tycoon? Mall Tycoon is created by INTCH. This is their first game on Poki! How can I play Mall Tycoon for free? You can play Mall Tycoon for free on Poki. Can I play Mall Tycoon on mobile devices and desktop? Mall Tycoon can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
